body.title: Fix test_after_action_reviewer: registry empty because tools not imported
body.result: Import devices.igor.tools.after_action_reviewer before registry check; use devices.igor.tools.registry (correct singleton). 9/9 tests green.
body.description:
test_run_after_action_review_is_registered imports lab.utility_closet.registry but never imports devices.igor.tools.after_action_reviewer to populate it. The test was probably working when the tools imported via a side effect that no longer fires after the wild_igor→devices migration. Fix: add the tools import to the test or change what it checks.

**Affected files:** tests/test_after_action_reviewer.py
**Design rules:** none apply
**Scope boundary:** fix the test only — not the tool registration logic
**Test plan:** test passes in isolation after fix
